ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "command_name" TEXT /* Name of the SQL command (e.g., SELECT, UPSERT) */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of the command (e.g., DDL, DML, DQL) */,
  "command_syntax" TEXT /* Syntax of the command */,
  "command_description" TEXT /* Description of the command */,
  "command_status" TEXT /* Status of the command (e.g., draft, reviewed, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the command */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the command was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the command */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the command was last modified */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the command is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_examples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each example */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the example belongs to */,
  "example_text" TEXT /* SQL query example */,
  "example_description" TEXT /* Description of the example */,
  "example_status" TEXT /* Status of the example (e.g., draft, reviewed, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the example */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the example was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the example */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the example was last modified */,
  "is_complex" INTEGER /* Indicates if the example is complex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_examples_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the command */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the command was executed */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* SQL query text */,
  "query_result" TEXT /* Result of the query execution */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to execute the query in milliseconds */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the execution environment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the execution (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the execution failed */,
  "query_size" INTEGER /* Size of the query text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_usage_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES command_execution_environment ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_usage_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, DBA, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was last modified */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_comments_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text of the command in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, reviewed, published) */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_versions_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_color" TEXT /* Color code for the tag for visual differentiation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_tags_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the rating is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  "is_reviewed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating has been reviewed by a moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_ratings_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the favorite is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the command as a favorite */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the command was marked as a favorite */,
  "favorite_status" TEXT /* Status of the favorite (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_favorites_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the history event is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_history_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the permission is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is granted to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was granted */,
  "is_revoked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission has been revoked */,
  "revoked_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_permissions_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the log is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the command */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or details of the log */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_logs_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the subscription is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed to the command */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the subscription was created */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_subscriptions_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., DDL, DML, DQL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_color" TEXT /* Color code for the category for visual differentiation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_dialects" (
  "dialect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dialect */,
  "dialect_name" TEXT /* Name of the dialect (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dialect */,
  "dialect_version" TEXT /* Version of the dialect */,
  "dialect_status" TEXT /* Status of the dialect (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dialect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_dialect_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the mapping is associated with */,
  "dialect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dialect the command is compatible with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_dialect_mapping_dialect_id FOREIGN KEY ("dialect_id") REFERENCES command_dialects ("dialect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_dialect_mapping_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the mapping is associated with */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the command belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES command_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_category_mapping_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_syntax_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the validation is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message or details of the validation result */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., syntax, performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_syntax_validation_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_syntax_validation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_execution_environment" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., Development, Production, Testing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "environment_status" TEXT /* Status of the environment (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)
